name: realm-dev
//: host.docker.internal is built-in on Docker Desktop/OrbStack but NOT on native Linux Docker; map it to the host gateway so the vault (AGENT_VAULT_ADDR=host.docker.internal:14321) is reachable on both.
postCreateCommand: agent-vault vault discover --json || echo 'agent-vault not yet configured (set AGENT_VAULT_* env)'
